ChargingSession.title: ChargingSession
ChargingSession.description: A record of a completed charging session

userId.description: The UID of the user who requested the charge

date.description: The server timestamp when the charge was recorded

location.description: The location where the charge happened

energyDelivered.description: Amount of energy delivered in kWh

/charging_sessions/{sessionId}.description: Stores history of charging sessions per user
